title: Uninitialized register default value is not 'x' ?
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

Consider hello.v:
```
module hello;
  reg [3:0] cnt; 
  initial
    assert (cnt < 16);
endmodule
```
and 'hello.sby'
```
[options]
mode bmc

[engines]
smtbmc

[script]
read_verilog -formal hello.v
prep -top hello

[files]
hello.v
```

`iverilog -g2012 hello.v && ./a.out` output:
```
ERROR: hello.v:4:
       Time: 0  Scope: hello
```

the behavior of 'iverilog' is correct, since cnt is not initialized.

but `sby -f hello.sby` passed without any error:
```
SBY 19:50:27 [hello] DONE (PASS, rc=0)
```

## Expected behavior

sby should failed.
